action.reasoning: Observation: CRN model has persistent channel mismatch in decoder skip connections. Analysis: The skip connection indexing and channel math is wrong. Decision: Completely rewrite model.py with a simpler, well-tested CRN architecture with explicit channel tracking, verify with dummy forward pass, then train.
